_readme: HOW TO ADD OR UPDATE EVENTS: Each event needs a date (or date_end for multi-day), title, description, category, time, and optionally a url and location. Categories: 'worship', 'students', 'kids', 'adults', 'missions', 'community'. Recurring weekly events use 'recurring: true' — they always show. One-time events show until their date passes. Re-upload this file to HostGator after editing.

recurring.title: Sunday Morning Worship
recurring.description: Join us for two identical worship services every Sunday morning. All are welcome — come as you are.

recurring.title: Online Service
recurring.description: Can't make it in person? Watch live every Sunday at 11:15am and Wednesday evenings at 6:30pm.

recurring.title: Converge Student Ministry
recurring.description: All 6th–12th graders are invited! Food ($2 pizza / $4 Chick-fil-A), music, message, and small groups. Meal cards available for $20.

recurring.title: CRBC Kids — Sunday Morning
recurring.description: Age-appropriate worship and Bible teaching for children birth through 5th grade during both Sunday services.

recurring.title: Point-to-Point Men's Bible Study
recurring.description: Men's small group Bible study meeting weekly. Contact Konrad.Jonathan@gmail.com for more info.

recurring.title: Kanvas Women's Bible Study
recurring.description: Women's morning Bible study. Registration required — see the Connect page for the sign-up link.

recurring.title: Women's Christian Fellowship
recurring.description: A warm gathering for women to connect, study Scripture, and encourage one another.

events.title: Good News Club
events.description: CEF Good News Club — summer edition for elementary-age children. Fun, faith, and friends.

events.title: No Converge — Independence Day
events.description: No Converge student ministry this week in observance of Independence Day. See you next week!

events.title: Subzero — Summer Student Event
events.description: One of Converge's signature summer events. All middle and high school students welcome — invite a friend!

events.title: Noodle Games
events.description: Summer fun for Converge students. Pool noodles, competition, and chaos. All 6th–12th graders welcome.

events.title: Water War
events.description: Summer water battle for Converge students. Wear clothes you don't mind getting soaked!

events.title: VBS 2026
events.description: Vacation Bible School 2026 — a week of Bible stories, games, crafts, and music for kids. Registration opens soon.

events.title: Converge Fall Kickoff
events.description: Converge Student Ministry resumes for the school year. Bring a friend — this is one of our biggest nights of the year!

events.title: Fall Small Group Launch
events.description: New semester for all CRBC small groups. Great time to plug in if you've been looking for a group.
